ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "gaming_id" TEXT /* Gaming ID or handle of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., top laner, jungler, etc.) */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current contract status of the player */,
  "old_team" TEXT /* Previous team the player was associated with */,
  "new_team" TEXT /* Current team the player has transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the team is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  "roster_size" INTEGER /* Current roster size of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Coach or manager of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being transferred */,
  "old_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is leaving */,
  "new_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is joining */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., buyout, trade, free agency) */,
  "transfer_fee" TEXT /* Fee associated with the transfer */,
  "transfer_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the transfer (e.g., permanent, loan, temporary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_old_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("old_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_new_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team history record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player started with the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player left the team */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player during their time with the team */,
  "team_performance" TEXT /* Performance of the team during the player's tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, coach, analyst) */,
  "team_affiliation" TEXT /* Team affiliation of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths of the player */,
  "game_objectives" INTEGER /* Number of game objectives achieved by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfer_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer request */,
  "requesting_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team requesting the transfer */,
  "proposed_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player proposed for transfer */,
  "proposed_transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer proposed (e.g., buyout, trade, free agency) */,
  "proposed_transfer_fee" TEXT /* Fee proposed for the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfer_requests_proposed_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposed_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfer_requests_requesting_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("requesting_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
